description: Tail-risk 2x2: posterior DWL levels, exceedance probabilities, tail severity, and tail concentration.
Risk-price 2x2: welfare risk, re-entry carbon price uncertainty, joint price-welfare tail, and posterior price paths.
Preference-channel 2x2: EIS/PRTP states, rank correlations, EIS gradient, and preference-state tail heatmap.
EIS/RA heatmap for the 15-year delay with DWL color and median, 90th, and 95th percentile contours.
Smooth EIS/PRTP heatmap for the 15-year delay with DWL color and median, 90th, and 95th percentile contours.
Binned EIS/PRTP quintile heatmap for the 15-year delay with DWL color and median, 90th, and 95th percentile contours.
Line interaction plot: EIS quintile bins on the x-axis, median and 90th-percentile DWL by RA tercile, with bootstrap uncertainty bands.
Line interaction plot: EIS quintile bins on the x-axis, median and 90th-percentile DWL by PRTP tercile, without uncertainty bands.
